title: Analytics - Settings Changed
scenario: Analytics event logged for setting changes in the Poly Studio Mobile app and device sync, tracked via Firebase with device PID, global setting ID, and settings value
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name].
3. Go to Audio Settings and change any setting (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, or Notifications).
4. Observe that the setting change is synced to the Poly Bluetooth audio device.
5. Open the Firebase dashboard and navigate to the analytics event tracking section.
6. Verify that the event appears with default elements: graph, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
7. Check that the event includes custom parameters: device PID, global setting ID, and settings value.
8. Wait a few hours and confirm that the event count updates in the Firebase dashboard.
expected: An analytics event is logged in Firebase with default elements (graph, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment) plus custom parameters (device PID, global setting ID, settings value). Event counts update after a few hours.
